title: agropyron banaticum
intro: Agropyron banaticum, also known as meadow brome, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, and can be used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Agropyron banaticum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
